arts.ttl: Arsenal’s Plan B summer signing if Zubimendi deal fails
arts.sum: Arsenal have identified Barcelona star Frenkie de Jong as their Plan B target for the midfield this summer if they fail to land Martin Zubimendi. Arsenal are in the market for a top central midfielder this summer and De Jong is their plan B alternative if they fail to land top target Zubimendi.

arts.ttl: ‘He’s proved through his actions that he believes in me’ – Chris Wood explains record season
arts.sum: In an interview with L’Équipe, Chris Wood (33) looked to explain the season he is experiencing at Nottingham Forest, which has heralded an unexpected push for a Champions League place…

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah reveals secret talk with former Arsenal boss and what was said
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is having a vintage season with Liverpool as they look to clinch the Premier League title, and their iconic forward has opened up on an unlikely source of inspiration

arts.ttl: Arsenal XI vs Nottingham Forest – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal travel to face high-flying Nottingham Forest in the Premier League this evening. Mikel Arteta’s men saw their title dream suffer a severe dent after defeat to West Ham at the weekend. That result, coupled with Liverpool’s win at Manchester City, leaves the Gunners 11 points adrift of the league leaders. Even with a game […] The post Arsenal XI vs Nottingham Forest – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans tell Boehly: We’re not Arsenal, win or f*** off!
arts.sum: Chelsea might have claimed an easy 4-0 win over Southampton in the Premier League on Tuesday, but the poor recent form of the Stamford Bridge club sparked protests against owners Todd Boehly and Clearlake Capital prior to the match. Many were pictured outside Stamford Bridge prior to the clash wielding banners against the ownership, with supporters chanting ‘We want our Chelsea back’ and also the name of Roman Abramovich, who previously invested millions in the club.

arts.sum: Arsenal are in a very strange situation at the moment. Barring a minor miracle, it looks like the Gunners won’t be winning the league title...

arts.ttl: Liverpool draw PSG, Arsenal face PSV, Villa meet Club Brugge in last 16
arts.sum: Liverpool will face Paris St-Germain in the Champions League last-16, while Arsenal take on PSV Eindhoven and Aston Villa will play Club Brugge.
